novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship headline names a residue-modulus frontier, but Exhibit 9.1 computes only the 4-by-4 witness h and gives no worked computation of the advertised frontier over m, W, and G.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The omitted-bin invariance certificate has no Exhibit 9.k computation with a nonempty omitted-bin set; the only transcript is for the no-deletion 4-by-4 table.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship comparison to SchmidheinySiegloch2023EventStudies is by bibkey-level summary only; no section, equation, page, or quoted claim anchors the alleged frontier gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship comparison to CallawaySantAnna2021MultiplePeriods lacks a location-level anchor tying group-time aggregation to the omitted-bin primitive-character claim.

soundness_flags.label: Setup / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The regression is described as unit plus calendar-time fixed effects, but the alias module partial quotients adoption-residue rows and event-time columns; the required calendar-time diagonal r+k margin is not represented.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Calendar-residue aliasing is not defined independently of the RHS primitive Smith-kernel/Fourier-support condition, so the iff frontier currently reads as a definitional restatement.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the row-column map with an incidence map that explicitly includes calendar-time or calendar-residue diagonal margins, then define aliasing as equality after the actual ESFE residualization.
Add separate Exhibit 9 blocks for Conjecture 1 and Conjecture 2: one non-4-by-4 frontier instance and one nonempty omitted-bin instance, each with a full SC10 provenance transcript.
Add location-level anchors for Schmidheiny-Siegloch and Callaway-Sant'Anna and state exactly which published equation or section fails to decide the proposed SNF/Fourier certificate.

recommended_next_step: Reject this angle as currently promissory; relaunch only after the calendar-diagonal incidence object and the two focal exhibits are computed from Section 6 primitives.
